'''âng-w-d-m''' ('''kangawdemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turnkey|turnkey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turnkey|turnkey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-w-d-m
|-
! Lemma
| kangawdemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingawdemoko|thingawdemoko]] || [[word:jingawdemoko|jingawdemoko]] || [[word:shingawdemoko|shingawdemoko]] || [[word:kingawdemoko|kingawdemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungawdemoko|thuthungawdemoko]] || [[word:jujungawdemoko|jujungawdemoko]] || [[word:shushungawdemoko|shushungawdemoko]] || [[word:kukungawdemoko|kukungawdemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungawdemoko|thungawdemoko]] || [[word:jungawdemoko|jungawdemoko]] || [[word:shungawdemoko|shungawdemoko]] || [[word:kungawdemoko|kungawdemoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongawdemoko|thothongawdemoko]] || [[word:jojongawdemoko|jojongawdemoko]] || [[word:shoshongawdemoko|shoshongawdemoko]] || [[word:kokongawdemoko|kokongawdemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongawdemoko|thongawdemoko]] || [[word:jongawdemoko|jongawdemoko]] || [[word:shongawdemoko|shongawdemoko]] || [[word:kongawdemoko|kongawdemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongawdemoko|thongawdemoko]] || [[word:jongawdemoko|jongawdemoko]] || [[word:shongawdemoko|shongawdemoko]] || [[word:kongawdemoko|kongawdemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngawdemoko|thĂŠngawdemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠngawdemoko|jĂŠngawdemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠngawdemoko|shĂŠngawdemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠngawdemoko|kĂŠngawdemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangawdemoko|thathangawdemoko]] || [[word:jajangawdemoko|jajangawdemoko]] || [[word:shashangawdemoko|shashangawdemoko]] || [[word:kakangawdemoko|kakangawdemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangawdemoko|thangawdemoko]] || [[word:jangawdemoko|jangawdemoko]] || [[word:shangawdemoko|shangawdemoko]] || [[word:kangawdemoko|kangawdemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangawdemoko|thangawdemoko]] || [[word:jangawdemoko|jangawdemoko]] || [[word:shangawdemoko|shangawdemoko]] || [[word:kangawdemoko|kangawdemoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
